creator: jacob.block@gmail.com
text:
The CLI interface for calibre-server has changed and now the rc.d script is out of date. It looks like the --with-library option no longer exists and the last argument to calibre-server should just be the calibre library location (i.e. ${calibre_library}).

However I also see other calibre.in options that no longer match so I think some time needs to be spent reviewing the new CLI options.
